Navigation.categoryMenuHint: Choose a category to open its public video collection.
Navigation.categoryMenuEmpty: No active categories are available yet.

SubscriptionsPage.title: Manage membership access in one place
SubscriptionsPage.description: Track joined channels, renewal status, expiry dates, and auto-renewal controls when you need them.

autoRenew.title: Auto-renewal
autoRenew.description: New memberships enable auto-renewal by default. If you cancel renewal, your current access stays active until the cycle expires.

note.title: Protected access
note.cancel: Canceling renewal only stops the next cycle; it does not remove access that is still valid.
note.admin: If a channel pauses new memberships, you can still watch member content until your current cycle ends.

Subscriptions.title: Membership plans
Subscriptions.channelCount: {count, plural, =0 {No channels} one {# channel} other {# channels}}
Subscriptions.emptyDescription: When you join a channel membership, its access level and renewal details will appear here.

autoRenew.enabledDescription: New memberships enable auto-renewal by default. You can cancel renewal and keep watching until the expiry date.
autoRenew.inactiveDescription: You can renew from the channel management page if this plan is still available.
autoRenew.accessUntilFallback: You will keep access through the current cycle.

errors.cancelFailedRetry: Unable to cancel auto-renewal. Please try again.

Home.heroFallbackDescription: Step into the digital theater with high-quality content, decentralized distribution, and powered by the Aura Coin economy.
Home.noContent: No new content from Media Service. Please check back later.
Home.exploreByCategoryDesc: Select a category to view curated movies, courses, and videos.
Home.featuresTitle: A viewing space built on access and creator economics.
Home.featuresDesc: From tier-locked content and Aura Coin transactions to Studio tools, every element is designed to bring viewers and creators together in the same ecosystem.
Home.membershipLevelsDesc: Unlock premium content level by level, from standard viewing experiences to director's cuts and private screenings.
Home.creatorEconomyDesc: Transact securely using Aura Coins. Viewers can support creators directly, unlock content access, and maintain a transparent transaction history.
Home.creatorToolsDesc: High-quality hosting infrastructure, transparent analytics, and tools to connect directly with your audience.
Home.ctaDesc: Reserve your seat in The Velvet Gallery. Activate your Aura wallet and start exploring a new era of decentralized entertainment.
Home.footerDesc: © 2024 Velvet Gallery. The philosophy and brand identity of Velvet Gallery are property of Cinematic Immersion.

LibraryPage.signInToAccess: Sign in to access your purchased videos, membership plans, and watch history.

LibraryPage.noPurchasedVideos: You haven't purchased any videos yet.

messages.loadFailedRetry: Unable to load content library. Please try again.
messages.deleteFailed: Unable to delete video. Please try again.
messages.deleteSuccessFailed: Deleted failed processing video from Studio.
messages.draftMissingSession: Cannot find upload session details for this draft.
messages.confirmFailed: Unable to confirm-upload video draft. If raw file is not uploaded, please click Resume upload.
messages.confirmSuccess: Upload confirmed. Video will move to processing queue.
messages.reuploadSuccess: Completed file upload to S3. Click checkmark to confirm-upload when ready to process.
messages.reuploadFailed: Unable to continue video upload for draft.
messages.noRejectReason: No rejection reason provided by the system.

notices.draftWarning: Video will be deleted after 24 hours if you do not confirm upload. Click upload to replace draft file, then click checkmark to confirm-upload when ready to process.
notices.failedWarning: Video processing failed. You can delete the failed version and upload again.

preview.title: Video preview
preview.subtitle: Preview your processed video exactly from Studio. Viewer access, purchases, and membership rules still apply on public watch surfaces.

notReady.processingMessage: Playback becomes available after moderation and HLS processing finish. Refresh this page when the pipeline completes.
notReady.rejectedMessage: Rejected videos cannot be previewed. Review the rejection reason in Content Library, then upload a compliant replacement.
notReady.failedMessage: This asset did not finish processing, so there is no playable stream yet. Delete the failed upload and try again.
notReady.succeededMessage: The asset is ready. The preview will unlock once the public-ready state is synced.
notReady.defaultMessage: Only READY videos can be played in Creator Studio. Complete upload and processing before opening the player.

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load this Studio video.
errors.loadFailedRetry: Unable to load this Studio video. Please try again.
errors.noDescription: No description has been added yet.

statusMessage.processing: Video is being processed. The system will automatically update when changes occur.
statusMessage.succeeded: Video processing completed and ready to play.
statusMessage.default: Only READY videos can be played in Creator Studio. Complete upload and processing before opening the player.

draftActions.title: Complete or cancel this draft

errors.missingSession: Cannot find upload session details for this draft.
errors.resumeFailed: Unable to continue video upload for draft.

messages.confirmSuccess: Upload confirmed. Video will move to processing queue.

public.title: Public
public.description: Everyone can watch your video after processing and moderation. It can appear on your channel and in discovery surfaces.
public.descriptionShort: Available to everyone on your public feed.

unlisted.title: Unlisted
unlisted.description: Anyone with the video link can watch it. This visibility mode is not available in the current API yet.

private.title: Private
private.description: Only viewers with explicit access can watch your video after the upload and review pipeline completes.
private.descriptionShort: Only visible to you or those with link.
